title: SENIOR AND SPECIAL NEEDS HOUSING - 211info
text: LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY SENIOR AND SPECIAL NEEDS HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Owns and manages affordable housing properties. 1250 SE Queen Avenue Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Low-income older adults, adults with disabilities, and individuals with special needs Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 928-6901 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Property Management Department (541) 928-6901 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Varies by unit DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Turn off 99E/Pacific Boulevard at Queen Avenue, just north of Dutch Bros. Continue past Dari Mart on the left. LBHA is on the right just before the Cascades West building. Services: Public Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Public Housing * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Public Housing * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FAMILY HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SELF-SUFFICIENCY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
